constraints: Always-on MetaBlooms governance is mandatory baseline; cartridge governance is additive.
Tracker finalization must be an explicit stage-finalization contract, not an optional helper.
A tracker state is stale if current_stage/evidence/history do not bind to the latest stage receipt and handoff.
DONE/BLOCKED status claims require receipt/handoff evidence and validation report.
Compact mobile tracker format remains mandatory: no box drawing or pipe-table layout.
implementation_boundary: Patch only tracker lifecycle/finalization enforcement; no FL17 promotion; no full OS export.
